overview: A mobile-first, player-centric web app for following individual female handball players in the Norwegian REMA 1000-ligaen. Follow your favorite players, get a personalized feed, explore team rosters, and compare players by position — all in a sleek dark sports-app design with real Profixio API data and mock-data fallback.
features: Personalized feed showing only followed players with form sparklines
Follow/unfollow players from anywhere — cards, team profiles, search
Player profile hub with next match, comparison, and team navigation
Team roster grid with clickable player cards and direct follow buttons
Position-based player comparison with tables and mini charts
Sticky bottom navigation: Home, Search, Teams, Favorites
Real data from Profixio API with graceful mock-data fallback
Loading skeletons and empty states throughout
